name: MEME HORSE
description: $MHORSE is a community-driven meme token on the BNB Chain (BEP-20) that captures the wild, independent spirit of the Year of the Fire Horse — a once-in-60-years zodiac event symbolizing power, energy, and degen culture. Fair launched with no presale, no insiders, and LP burned, $MHORSE brings pure memetic fun to crypto, celebrating horse-themed hype and BNB ecosystem engagement. Trade responsibly and ride the fire horse’s stampede to the moon!
